import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { pondService, environmentLogService, sensorService, notificationService } from '../../services/api' import DashboardCard, { evaluateMetric } from '../../components/DashboardCard' import { Line } from 'react-chartjs-2' import { Chart as ChartJS, CategoryScale, LinearScale, PointElement, LineElement, Tooltip, Legend, Filler, } from 'chart.js' import { SENSOR_ORDER, SENSOR_PROFILES, getSensorTypeKey } from '../../utils/sensorMetrics' import '../../styles/dashboard.css' import '../../styles/dashboard-cards.css' import '../../styles/technician/technician-layout.css' import '../../styles/technician/technician-dashboard.css' ChartJS.register(CategoryScale, LinearScale, PointElement, LineElement, Tooltip, Legend, Filler) export const TechnicianDashboard = () => { const [monitoredPonds, setMonitoredPonds] = useState([]) const [recentEnvironmentLogs, setRecentEnvironmentLogs] = useState([]) const [activeSensors, setActiveSensors] = useState([]) const [allSensors, setAllSensors] = useState([]) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [error, setError] = useState(null) const [alerts, setAlerts] = useState([]) useEffect(() => { fetchData() }, []) const fetchData = async () => { try { setLoading(true) const [pondsRes, sensorsRes, alertsRes] = await Promise.all([ pondService.getAllPonds(), sensorService.getAllSensors(), notificationService.getNotifications(), ]) const ponds = pondsRes?.data?.data || [] const sensors = sensorsRes?.data?.data || [] const notifs = alertsRes?.data?.data || [] setMonitoredPonds(ponds) setAllSensors(sensors) setActiveSensors(sensors.filter((s) => String(s.status).toUpperCase() === 'ACTIVE').length) setAlerts(notifs.slice(0, 6)) // load recent environment logs for first pond (if available) if (ponds.length > 0) { try { const envRes = await environmentLogService.getByPondId(ponds[0].pond_id) setRecentEnvironmentLogs(envRes?.data?.data || []) } catch (e) { // ignore; not critical for dashboard } } } catch (err) { setError('Lỗi tải dữ liệu') console.error(err) } finally { setLoading(false) } } // Calculate monitoring statistics const monitoringStats = { totalPonds: monitoredPonds.length, activeSensors: activeSensors, currentAlerts: alerts.length, recentLogs: recentEnvironmentLogs.length, } if (loading) { return (
); } return (

{SENSOR_ORDER.map((key) => { const profile = SENSOR_PROFILES[key] // find a representative sensor with this type const representative = allSensors.find((s) => getSensorTypeKey(s.sensor_type) === key) const value = representative?.current_value ?? null const display = value === null || value === undefined ? '-' : Number(value).toFixed(1) const sparkData = { labels: [1,2,3,4,5], datasets: [ { data: Array(5).fill(value === null || value === undefined ? 0 : Number(value)), borderColor: profile.color || '#1f87b7', backgroundColor: 'transparent', tension: 0.3, pointRadius: 0, } ] } const sparkOptions = { plugins: { legend: { display: false } }, scales: { x: { display: false }, y: { display: false } }, elements: { line: { borderWidth: 2 } } } return (
{profile.label}
